name: Family Favorite Cake-Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Cream margarine and non-nutritive sweetener. Sift baking powder, salt, flour, then add alternately with skim milk to the creamed mixture. Add almond extract, and beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, then fold in. Pour into 2 well-greased 9-inch layer pans. Bake about 30 minutes.
Cool a few minutes, then remove from pans and cool further on wire racks. Top with Creamy Frosting. Makes 1 two-layer cake.
